title: AgentRequest
description: Request payload accepted by the RAG agent.

new_conversation.description: When true, the agent starts a new conversation. When false, conversation_id must identify an existing conversation.

conversation_id.description: Existing conversation identifier. Required when new_conversation is false.

user_request.description: User request text to be processed by the RAG agent.

user_id.description: Optional user identifier reserved for future authentication, authorization, auditing, and personalization use cases.

user_role.description: Optional user role reserved for future authorization and behavior customization use cases.
